sentences.arabic: تَشْهَدُ مُدُنٌ عَرَبِيَّةٌ كَثِيرَةٌ تَحَوُّلًا رَقْمِيًّا كَبِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Mnogi arapski gradovi svjedoče velikoj digitalnoj transformaciji.
sentences.translationEn: Many Arab cities are witnessing a great digital transformation.

sentences.arabic: يُؤَسِّسُ الشَّبَابُ شَرِكَاتِ تِقْنِيَّةٍ حَدِيثَةٍ فِي دُبَيَّ وَالرِّيَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Mladi osnivaju moderne tehnološke kompanije u Dubaiju i Rijadu.
sentences.translationEn: Youth are establishing modern technology companies in Dubai and Riyadh.

sentences.arabic: تَدْعَمُ هَذِهِ الِابْتِكَارَاتُ الِاقْتِصَادَ وَتَصْنَعُ مُسْتَقْبَلًا أَفْضَلَ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Ove inovacije podržavaju ekonomiju i stvaraju bolju budućnost za sve.
sentences.translationEn: These innovations support the economy and create a better future for everyone.
